investmentsImport.title: Import transactions
investmentsImport.description: Upload an exchange CSV, a broker PDF, or paste your transaction history. AI will extract buys and sells. You'll review before anything is imported.

upload.modeAiHint: Upload any file — AI extracts your transactions automatically. Costs tokens.
upload.modeCsvHint: Upload a CSV from your broker and map columns manually. No AI used.

review.empty: AI didn't find any transactions in this file.
review.parsedSymbolHint: We couldn't auto-match {symbol} — pick the right security below.
review.duplicateSecurity: Same security is picked on another row
review.duplicateBadgeTooltip: This looks like a possible duplicate of an existing transaction. Click to skip it — otherwise a new transaction will be created alongside the existing one (no merge or override).

tooltips.security: We picked a security automatically based on the AI-extracted ticker. Click the field to override the match if it's wrong.
tooltips.currency: Currency the cash side of the trade was settled in (e.g. USD, EUR). It does not change how the holding is stored — amounts are normalized to your base currency using historical exchange rates at the trade date.
tooltips.parentRowDuplicates: {count} possible duplicate in this holding will be imported as a new transaction unless skipped. | {count} possible duplicates in this holding will be imported as new transactions unless skipped.

notifications.extractFailed: Could not extract transactions from the file.
notifications.csvParseFailed: Could not parse the CSV. Check the file format and try again.

columnMapping.sideValueMappingHint: Tell us what each value in the side column means.
columnMapping.sideValueMappingEmpty: No values found in this column yet.
columnMapping.cashMovementsNote: Cash deposits and withdrawals aren't supported yet. Pick 'Skip these rows' for those side values to leave them out of the import.

tooltips.fees: Column with commission/fees per transaction. If not mapped, fees default to 0.
tooltips.currency: Quote currency column (e.g. USD, EUR, USDT). Determines the cash side of each trade. Falls back to the Default currency below when empty or unmapped.
tooltips.name: Optional security display name (e.g. 'Apple Inc.'). Used for display in the review step only — ticker remains the authoritative identifier.
tooltips.defaultCurrency: Used when the Currency column above is empty or not mapped.
tooltips.defaultAssetClass: Hint for matching your symbols to securities. Pick the class that matches most rows in your file — you can override per security in the review step.
